Class MainController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.MainController
public class MainController extends Object
Main controller for the application, responsible for managing the main content area and switching between different views (e.g., order report, employee management, inventory management). It loads the appropriate FXML files based on user interactions and updates the UI accordingly.
